pages.raw_text:
The second day of the annual
meeting of the Washington State
Federated Women's Clubs opened
with large attendance at Masonic
temple. Miss Margaret MacLean
of the Ladies Musical club, Taco
ma, rendered a solo on the piano.
Officers reports were then read.
Major Fem, forest supervisor OF
the Bitter Root reserve, delivered
an address illustrating his work and
the labors Of the commission to
preserve scenic beauty. Mrs. w.
l.. Clark of Port Townsend re-
ported the work of the educational
committee; Mrs. e. Chantler of Ia
coma read the report Of the indus
trial committee; Mrs. A. F. House
of Spokane returned the report of
the badge committee. This after
non other reports are being read.


This evening the temple will be
the scene of reception of the club
women. All the leading ladies of
Spokane are expected to visit with
the club members.
